notes: Alpha public build. Older alpha builds must install this version so the Mod files ready state uses the same selected-archive preflight as Install. This installer includes the runtime app, operational README, required notices, WebView2 loader, bundled archive extractor, in-app SHA-verified self-updates, Dev Panel list-version authoring, and Ready updates based only on higher online list versions. The installer is unsigned, so Windows SmartScreen may show a warning until code signing is added.
